title: Personal User - download/install, Login with Gmail, not present on any Lens tenant
scenario: Personal Gmail user without Lens tenant logs into Poly Studio Mobile app and verifies paired headset displays correctly with no Lens registration
steps: 1. Download and install the Poly Studio Mobile app from the app store.
2. Launch the app and complete the onboarding flow.
3. During onboarding, log in with a personal Gmail account that is not associated with any Lens tenant.
4. Pair a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) with the mobile device.
5. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to the Home screen.
6. Verify that the paired headset appears on the Home screen.
7. Tap on the device name to open the Device Settings screen.
8. Verify that the device image and all settings (e.g., Audio Settings, ANC, Transparency Mode, Equalizer) are displayed correctly.
9. Navigate to Account settings and confirm that the user is logged in with the personal Gmail account.
10. Verify that the user is not registered on any Lens tenant (no Lens-related account info or tenant association appears).
expected: The paired headset appears in the app with correct device image and settings. The personal Gmail user is logged in and is not registered on any Lens tenant.
